Feats — Male Erenlander Human Fighter: 1/Rogue: 11
Strength: 14 (2) Dexterity: 11 (0) Constitution: 15 (2) Intelligence: 12 (1) Wisdom: 13 (1) Charisma: 11 (0)
Background: Deserter Heroic Path: Preserver Alignment: Neutral
Ability Boosts: Constitution: 2; Dexterity: 1; Strength: 1 Experience: 106088/120000 Level: 12 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 210/420
Ability Notes:
Captor: +1 Strength
Human Ability Adjustment: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Knife Fighter: +1 Dexterity
Scavenger: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom)
Seamaster: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Wisdom)
Suspicious: +1 Intelligence
Unremarkable: +1 Wisdom
Ability Boosts: 4 to distribute
Reliable Talent: Scores at least a 10 on proficient ability rolls
Seamaster: Can climb ropes at full speed
Second-Story Work: Can climb at full speed
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: 4
Feat Count: General: 4; Heroic: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Fighting Style); Rogue (Roguish Archetype)
Feats: Battlefield Healer; Brawler; Captor; Fellhunter; Harrier; Improvised Fighter; Knife Fighter; Learned; Paranoid; Polyglot; Scavenger; Seamaster; Shieldwall Soldier; Subtle Spellcaster; Suspicious; Unremarkable Erenlander Human Features: Erenlander Skills; Human Ability Adjustment; Human Feat Bonus; Human Skills Rogue Features: Armor Proficiency (Light); Cunning Action; Evasion; Expertise (Rogue); Fast Hands; Reliable Talent; Roguish Archetype; Save Proficiency (Dexterity; Intelligence); Second-Story Work; Skill Proficiency (Choose 4 from Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Investigation, Perception, Performance, Persuasion, Sleight Of Hand, Stealth); Sneak Attack; Supreme Sneak; Thief; Thieves' Cant; Tool Proficiency (Thieves' Tools); Uncanny Dodge; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Hand Crossbow; Longsword; Rapier; Shortsword) Fighter Features: Armor Proficiency (Light; Heavy; Shield); Fighting Style (Great Weapon Fighting); Fighting Style; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Perception, Survival); Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Deserter Features: Old Veteran; Skill Proficiency (Athletics/Perception); Weapon Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Martial)
Feature Notes:
Fighting Style: 1 selection
Human Feat Bonus: +1 general feat
Roguish Archetype: 1 selection
Old Veteran: Knows how to infiltrate military organizations
Seamaster: Increases the speed of a commanded ship by 2 MPH
Unremarkable: Can run through crowds unnoticed/Reduces foes' passive Perception to notice self to 12
Skill Proficiency: Arcana; Athletics; Deception; History; Insight; Intimidation; Nature; Perception; Performance; Sleight Of Hand; Stealth
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) 0 Insight: (wis) 9 Performance: (cha) 4
Animal Handling: (wis) 1 Intimidation: (cha) 4 Persuasion: (cha) 0
Arcana: (int) 5 Investigation: (int) 1 Religion: (int) 1
Athletics: (str) 6 Medicine: (wis) 1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) 4
Deception: (cha) 4 Nature: (int) 5 Stealth: (dex) 4
History: (int) 5 Perception: (wis) 5 Survival: (wis) 1
Tool Proficiency: Glassblower's Tools; Land Vehicles; Thieves' Tools
Languages: Erenlander; High Elven; Trader's Tongue
Skill Notes:
Erenlander Skills: Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from any)/Tool Proficiency (Land Vehicles; Choose 1 from any Artisan)
Human Skills: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)/Language (Erenlander; Choose 1 from any)
Learned: Language (Choose 1 from any)/Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from History, Religion)
Suspicious: Skill Proficiency (Insight)/+4 Insight
Battlefield Healer: Successful DC 15 Medicine with a healer's kit use restores 3 hit points to a patient with 0 hit points
Expertise (Rogue): +4 on 4 chosen proficient skills or Thieves' Tools
Fellhunter: Can use a bonus action to make a DC 12 Religion check once per long rest; success gives self advantage on saves vs. undead and inflicts disadvantage on undead targets' saves for 1 min
Learned: Can read and write
Polyglot: Gains general language understanding after listening for 1 day, and a successful DC 15 Intelligence each week gives fluency
Scavenger: Successful DC 15 Perception after a battle recovers all spent ammo, and a successful DC 12 Investigation in a settlement scavenges weapon or armor materials worth up to 3d10+1 GP
Seamaster: Suffers no disadvantage to pilot a ship during a storm
Second-Story Work: +0' running jump distance
Subtle Spellcaster: Successful Sleight Of Hand vs. passive Perception allows casting spells unnoticed
Supreme Sneak: Has advantage on Stealth when moving at half speed
Suspicious: +4 passive Perception/Successful DC 20 Investigation reveals flaws in a creature's story details
Thieves'Cant: Understands jargon and signs known only by rogues
Combat
Hit Points: 65 Initiative: 0 Armor Class: 11 Attacks Per Round: 1
Armor Proficiency: Heavy; Light; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Atharak; Hand Crossbow; Improvised; Longsword; Martial Weapons; Rapier; Shortsword; Simple Weapons
Armor: Leather Shield: None Weapons: Dart (+6 1d4+2 R20/60); Improvised (+6 1d6+2 R20/60); Sling (+4 1d4 R30/120); Staghorn (+6 1d4+2 R20/60); Unarmed (+6 1d4+2)
Combat Notes:
Brawler: Unarmed strike inflicts 1d4 damage, or 1d8 on a grappled target
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +24
Improvised Fighter: Weapon Proficiency (Improvised)/Improvised weapons inflict 1d6 damage
Strength Attack Adjustment: +2
Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Battlefield Healer: Self and allies regain an extra Hit Die from a long rest
Brawler: Can use a bonus action after a successful unarmed strike to knock prone a Medium or smaller target, make a second strike, or grapple
Captor: Has advantage on Athletics to grapple when unseen, silences grappled creatures, and can move at full speed while grappling without provoking opportunity attacks
Cunning Action: Can use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide once per rd
Fast Hands: Can use the Cunning Action bonus action to use Sleight Of Hand, disarm a trap, open a lock, or Use An Object
Fighting Style (Great Weapon Fighting): Can reroll 1s and 2s on two-handed weapon damage
Harrier: 30' mounted move negates foe opportunity attacks and causes successful melee attacks to knock prone
Improvised Fighter: Can destroy an improvised weapon to gain +1 damage die
Knife Fighter: Dagger crits on a roll of 18-20, and a critical hit inflicts disadvantage on attacks for 1 rd
Paranoid: Cannot be surprised when asleep/Can take a free Dodge action during initiative
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+1 hit points once per short rest
Shieldwall Soldier: Adjacent allies gain +1 armor class, or +2 if self holds a shield
Sneak Attack: +6d6 damage on attacks with advantage or on a foe threatened by another adjacent creature
Uncanny Dodge: Can use a reaction to reduce the damage taken from an attack by half
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Dexterity; Intelligence; Strength
Save: Charisma: 0; Constitution: 6; Dexterity: 4; Intelligence: 5; Strength: 6; Wisdom: 1
Save Notes: Evasion: Successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failures yield half damage
Magic
Magic Notes: Subtle Spellcaster: Can cast 2 chosen level 1 bard, druid, sorcerer, or wizard spells once per long rest
Notes
Validation Errors: Feat Allocation: 5 available vs. 16 allocated
